Bash(cd "/Users/justin/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Projects/ghosteditor-claude-code/backend" && .venv/bin/python -c "
from pathlib import Path
from app.manuscripts.extraction import detect_chapters

SAMPLES_DIR = Path\('tests/eval/samples'\)
START_MARKER = '*** START OF THE PROJECT GUTENBERG EBOOK'
END_MARKER = '*** END OF THE PROJECT GUTENBERG EBOOK'

for filename in ['moby_dick_full.txt', 'pride_and_prejudice_full.txt']:
    text = \(SAMPLES_DIR / filename\).read_text\(encoding='utf-8-sig'\)
    start = text.find\(START_MARKER\)
    if start != -1:
        newline = text.find\('\\n', start\)
        text = text[newline + 1:]
    end = text.find\(END_MARKER\)
    if end != -1:
        text = text[:end]
    text = text.strip\(\)
    chapters = detect_chapters\(text\)
    print\(f'=== {filename} ==='\)
    for i, ch in enumerate\(chapters[:5]\):
        title = ch.get\('title'\) or 'untitled'
        print\(f'  Ch {ch[\\"chapter_number\\"]}: {title[:60]} \({ch[\\"word_count\\"]} words\)'\)
        if i == 0:
            print\(f'    First 100 chars: {ch[\\"text\\"][:100]}'\)
" 2>&1)
